title: Fix incorrect monthly totals in the expense ledger
description: The csv-ledger expense tracker produces wrong monthly net totals. The existing test in src/report.rs fails: the reported January net total does not match the expected value. Investigate the full pipeline — parse_csv in src/parser.rs feeds build_ledger in src/ledger.rs which feeds monthly_totals in src/report.rs — and fix the defect so that monthly totals correctly reflect money received and money paid out.
acceptance_criteria: Monthly net totals reflect money received minus money paid out for each month, per the modules' documented conventions.
The existing test monthly_net_totals_are_correct in src/report.rs passes.
The gate command `cargo test` exits zero with no test failures.

files_to_modify.change: Verify that parsed transactions match this module's documented conventions and correct any defect your investigation finds.
The failing test lives here; confirm the monthly accumulation logic is correct or adjust it if the investigation reveals a defect.
